title: activity — settings
description: Settings this module contributes to the settings registry. Canonical group/section/field taxonomy per modules/settings/attributes.json contract. One #[AsSetting] class — `ActivitySettings` — published under group key `activity`, discovered at boot.

groups.label: Activity feed
groups.description: Retention + visibility of the tenant activity feed.

sections.label: Retention
sections.description: Fine-tune retention window if tenant needs different than plan default. Cannot exceed the plan cap.

fields.name: retention_override_days
fields.label: Retention override (days)
fields.helpText: Empty = follow plan default (Free 30d / Team 90d / Enterprise 365d).

sections.label: Feed visibility
sections.description: Peer-visibility rules for the activity feed.

fields.name: feed_user_causer_visibility
fields.label: Peer feed visibility
fields.helpText: How much of another user's causer feed a regular user may see.
